The '''BD-27 Transport''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[barge driver]]. It was the predecessor to the [[Action series/Legends|Action series]] of medium [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], and defined the basic shape of that transport.

==Characteristics==
The BD-27 measured 100 meters in length, and its automated systems required only a pilot and co-pilot to operate. However, it required extensive maintenance. The ship had no weapons and weak shields. The entire ship could be connected to a cargo module capable of carrying 75,000 metric tons. The BD-27 was quickly replaced by larger bulk freighters, and was relegated to use in small operations.<ref name="AJ9" />

{{Ship-stub}}
